name: Patient X
history: Recent shoulder surgery with a painful recovery process. Ongoing pain, numbness, and tingling related to a herniated cervical disc. Prior history of physical therapy for past walking difficulties and back issues. Past prolonged illness associated with a period of immobility. Started a new relationship and later experienced a return of physical symptoms.
intermediate_belief: I must endure pain and limitations without complaint.
intermediate_belief_depression: My physical limitations define my worth.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of activities that might exacerbate pain, reliance on others for support.
situation: Attending a Halloween party while in persistent pain.
auto_thought: I won't be able to enjoy the party because of my pain.
behavior: Withdrawn and less engaged in social activities.
